brand.name: Napoli 7
brand.addressLine1: Shop 4, Roof building, opposite Delta Center
brand.addressLine2: 213 Shaikh Rashid Bin Abdul Aziz Aaemi St – Al Jurf 2, Ajman

deals.heading: Deals
deals.intro: Welcome offers, seasonal specials, and loyalty rewards from the Napoli 7 kitchen.
deals.footnote: Offers available for takeout and delivery orders only.

about.heading: Our Story
about.intro: From a Neapolitan family table to an Ajman wood-fired oven.

location.heading: Location
location.intro: Find us, call us, or send a WhatsApp message — we are here every day.
location.deliveryNote: We currently deliver to selected areas of Al Jurf and surrounding neighbourhoods. Outside our zone? Order for pickup.

contact.heading: Contact
contact.intro: Reach the kitchen directly. We answer messages between 10:00 and 22:30.

delivery.heading: Delivery
delivery.intro: Hot from our oven to your door, in around thirty minutes.

menu.heading: Menu
menu.intro: Twenty-three items, prepared with the same care every day.

cart.heading: Your cart
cart.empty: No items yet. Order your first pizza.

checkout.heading: Checkout
checkout.codNote: Pay cash to the delivery driver on arrival.
checkout.feeTbd: TBD — will be confirmed by the kitchen
